The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\Pedro Polo\\Documents\\GitHub.serviceRawFile:
service: ecommerce-muebles-ar-backend

useDotenv: true

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    DATABASE_URL: ${env:DATABASE_URL}
    COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID: ${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID}
    COGNITO_REGION: ${env:COGNITO_REGION}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - cognito-idp:AdminAddUserToGroup
          Resource: arn:aws:cognito-idp:us-east-1:${aws:accountId}:userpool/${env:COGNITO_USER_POOL_ID}
  httpApi:
    cors: true
    authorizers:
      cognitoAuthorizer:
        type: jwt
        identitySource: $request.header.Authorization
        issuerUrl: https://cognito-idp.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/us-east-1_3wUuOTyhl
        audience:
          - 2cv3c6ugmn0qg33h64s8n6iqlq

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

functions:
  getCategories:
    handler: src/products/getCategories.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /categories
          method: GET

  getProducts:
    handler: src/products/getProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products
          method: GET

  getProductById:
    handler: src/products/getProductById.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/{id}
          method: GET

  getTopProducts:
    handler: src/products/getTopProducts.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /products/top
          method: GET

  whoami:
    handler: src/auth/whoami.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /whoami
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  getFavorites:
    handler: src/favorites/getFavorites.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  addFavorite:
    handler: src/favorites/addFavorite.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  removeFavorite:
    handler: src/favorites/removeFavorite.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /favorites/{productId}
          method: DELETE
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  syncUser:
    handler: src/auth/syncUser.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /auth/sync
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  getCart:
    handler: src/cart/getCart.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart
          method: GET
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  addToCart:
    handler: src/cart/addToCart.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  updateCartItem:
    handler: src/cart/updateCartItem.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/{itemId}
          method: PUT
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  removeFromCart:
    handler: src/cart/removeFromCart.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /cart/{itemId}
          method: DELETE
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  checkout:
    handler: src/cart/checkout.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /checkout
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  createProduct:
    handler: src/admin/products/createProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products
          method: POST
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  updateProduct:
    handler: src/admin/products/updateProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{id}
          method: PUT
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

  deleteProduct:
    handler: src/admin/products/deleteProduct.handler
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /admin/products/{id}
          method: DELETE
          authorizer:
            name: cognitoAuthorizer

compiledCloudFormationTemplate.Description: The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application
